now.title: Current Role / Now
now.intro: Founder & CEO — FlowMind Studio LLC (Austin, TX). I design and build premium artistic websites that merge creative direction, engineering, and business growth.
now.description: I lead strategy, execution, and systems: conversion websites, ad landing pages, Google Business Profile optimization, technical performance, CRO, and lightweight automations for lead handling and follow-up.

services.title: What I Do
services.intro: I help businesses, brands, and founders turn ideas into polished digital products that look strong, feel professional, and are built to perform.

items.title: Premium Websites
items.body: Modern, high-converting websites built to create trust, communicate clearly, and generate better business opportunities.

items.title: Custom Software
items.body: Tailored digital tools designed to solve real workflows, organize information, and improve how a business operates.

items.title: Automation & AI
items.body: Smart systems that save time, reduce repetitive work, and add intelligent functionality to digital processes.

items.title: Optimization & Redesign
items.body: Improvements for existing websites or systems to make them clearer, faster, more modern, and more effective.

items.title: Digital Presence & Brand Experience
items.body: A stronger online presence through better structure, visuals, messaging, and presentation.

about.title: About
about.body: I bring 10+ years of experience across technology, operations, and leadership. I create living web experiences where visual storytelling, performance, and conversion strategy work together to generate real pipeline and revenue growth.

services.title: Services
services.body: Available for consulting, audits, and full builds. I can join from strategy to implementation and optimization.

items.title: Web Development
items.body: Modern websites, responsive interfaces, frontend architecture, performance optimization, UI implementation, and integrations.

items.title: Software & Systems
items.body: Custom tools, digital workflows, dashboards, structured solutions, and problem-solving systems.

items.title: Automation & AI
items.body: AI-assisted flows, process automation, smart interactions, classification logic, and efficiency-driven solutions.

items.title: Design & UX
items.body: Clear interfaces, visual hierarchy, polished user experience, and branding-aware digital design.

items.title: SEO & Digital Visibility
items.body: On-page structure, technical improvements, discoverability, local presence, and trust-building digital foundations.

items.title: Strategy & Conversion
items.body: Clear offers, stronger calls to action, better user journeys, and conversion-oriented decision making.
I lead a creative and technical studio focused on building premium digital experiences with strong visual identity and business intent.

why.title: Why Work With Me
why.intro: I bring together design, development, strategy, and execution in a way that strengthens projects from every angle.
points: I understand both the visual and technical side

items.body: Custom web experiences designed to make brands look stronger, communicate clearly, and convert better.

results.title: What I Aim to Create
results.body: A digital product should do more than exist. It should help a business communicate better, look stronger, create trust, reduce friction, and open the door to growth.

education.title: Education & Continuous Growth
education.body: My growth has been practical, self-directed, and deeply project-based. I've built my skills through real execution, experimentation, design iteration, and constant learning across web development, software, UX, automation, AI, and digital strategy.

workflow.title: How I Work
workflow.body: I work with clarity, intention, and strong attention to detail. First I align on the real objective, then I shape a solution that makes sense visually, technically, and strategically.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Great
contact.body: If you're looking for someone who can combine design, development, systems thinking, and execution, I'd be glad to hear about your project.
contact.support: Whether you need a premium website, a digital tool, an automation, a redesign, or an AI-powered idea brought to life, I can help turn it into something real.
contact.pitch: Open to strategic collaborations, consulting, and conversion-focused web builds.

footer.note: © 2026 Cristhian Guerrero. Built for speed, clarity, and conversion.

positioning.title: CEO Positioning Blueprint
positioning.intro: A premium personal-brand structure that looks elite while staying 100% real and evidence-based.

pillars.title: Four pillars to look top-tier
items: Authority statement: one sentence defining who you help, how, and the measurable result.
Proof wall: selected wins with context, numbers, and your exact role in each outcome.
CEO narrative: concise timeline from operator → strategist → founder.
Power CTA: direct booking flow for strategy calls, partnerships, or key opportunities.

launch.title: Launch in 7 days
items: Day 1–2: sharpen your positioning message and headline.
Day 3–4: turn your best projects into business-ready case studies.
Day 5: build a premium media kit + downloadable one-page CV.
Day 6–7: publish, connect analytics, and start posting proof-driven content.

items.body: Lead strategy, development, design direction, local SEO systems, and conversion-focused implementation for local business clients.
Hands-on track record across delivery, process optimization, client execution, and growth systems in digital environments.

items.title: Continuous self-directed specialization
items.body: Advanced practice in web engineering, conversion systems, local SEO, and creative direction.

items.title: Portfolio-based capability proof
items.body: Real-world project delivery and measurable outcomes as primary credibility signals.
